currentState: Emergency protector and survivor. Neral becomes the first adult Miri can bear, and that immediate trust is enough to get the girl out of the cellar and onto the road north.
powerDynamic: Neral holds all practical authority, but she uses it by lowering pressure rather than increasing it. Miri's consent and calm matter to whether the extraction works at all.

physicalDynamics.pattern: Neral crouches to Miri's height with empty hands instead of looming over her, then later steadies both horse and child at the saddle.

nameUsage.neralCallsMiri: Uses her name immediately and talks to her in practical, concrete reassurances.
nameUsage.miriCallsNeral: Accepts her first as ranger and rescuer rather than with any personal shorthand yet.

history.event: Neral is the first ranger Miri does not recoil from in the cellar.
Sylvanas chooses Neral as both courier and escort because her calm with Miri makes the dispatch safer as well as faster.

trajectory: Stranger and terrified survivor -> immediate field trust under pressure.
